scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates RuntimeException from custom TreeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader,String,Parser) throws IllegalStateException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalStateException is thrown with original message
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseInput propagates runtime exception
// Arrange stub TreeBuilder that always throws IllegalStateException
@Override public Document parse(Reader r, String baseUri, Parser parser) {
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader r, Element context, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }
IllegalStateException ex is thrown with message "fail-runtime";
